//: Copy to dun.json (committed, describes the PROJECT) or dun.local.json (gitignored, describes THIS MACHINE). Both are optional; with neither, dun spawns its built-in trio: code=poly-lsp-mcp, shell=mcpshell, docs=raglit.

servers.//: Override a built-in by reusing its id. Fields you omit are INHERITED, so pointing at a different binary does not mean restating its args.
Add a project-specific server. {{workspace}} and {{raglit_home}} are substituted at spawn — the same token llm-bench toolsets use.
Drop a built-in you do not want. One line, rather than re-listing the servers you are keeping.
